next_steps: Empiric treatment with doxycycline for suspected Rocky Mountain spotted fever
Complete blood count with peripheral smear and inflammatory markers (CRP, ESR)
Skin biopsy for H&E staining and direct immunofluorescence (DIF)
Echocardiography to assess for coronary artery involvement
Blood cultures and laboratory evaluation for systemic inflammatory response
Initiate empiric doxycycline for suspected Rickettsia rickettsii
Complete blood count with peripheral smear and platelet count
Urinalysis to assess for renal involvement
Echocardiography to assess coronary artery status
Coagulation studies (PT, PTT, fibrinogen) to rule out DIC
